design_notes.value_system: Materials are mostly raw inputs. Zone draws should feel like gathering, not payoff.
design_notes.deck_structure: Each zone uses a mixed raw-material deck with a small amount of weak emergency forage and two hazards.
design_notes.food_philosophy: Food comes mainly from crafted procurement tools, cooking, and preparation systems.
design_notes.water_philosophy: Water is unsafe by default until treated by fire, filter, or container-based prep.
design_notes.hazard_philosophy: Each zone has a distinct danger and at least one crafted protection path.

forest.name: Forest
forest.identity: Shelter wood, bindings, medicine plants, and hunting cover
forest.opportunity: Bow use, snare use, torch use, herb kit use

cards.name: Fallen Branch
cards.description: Basic fuel and frame stock.

cards.name: Bark Strip
cards.description: Rough bindings and light cover.

cards.name: Vine
cards.description: Flexible lash material for snares and shelter.

cards.name: Tinder Bundle
cards.description: Dry tinder gathered from the forest floor.

cards.name: Sap Clump
cards.description: Sticky fuel for fire starting.

cards.name: Wild Herbs
cards.description: Raw herb material for medicine and poultices.

cards.name: Snare Bait
cards.description: Weak emergency bait for trap work. Risky and inefficient as food.

cards.name: Bark Fiber
cards.description: Processed bark strands for cordage.

cards.name: Straight Sapling
cards.description: Pole stock for tools and light frames.

cards.name: Hardwood Bough
cards.description: Stronger frame stock for bows and supports.

cards.name: Medicinal Moss
cards.description: Useful in dressing wounds and calming irritation.

cards.name: Resin Chunk
cards.description: High-value resin for fast fire and waterproofing.

cards.name: Dry Fungus
cards.description: Reliable spark catcher for fire starting.

cards.name: Bow Stave
cards.description: High-quality stave for bow crafting.

cards.name: Animal Attack
cards.description: Predator pressure and panic. -2 Morale, -1 Hunger if you lack shelter.

cards.name: Poison Forage
cards.description: Dangerous plants and bad judgment. -1 Morale, -1 Hunger. Forager negates it.

river.name: River
river.identity: Unsafe water, reeds, clay, stone, and shoreline work
river.opportunity: Fishing pole use, fish trap use, water filter use, clay pot use

cards.name: Reeds
cards.description: Flexible shoreline stalks for weaving and filters.

cards.name: Mud
cards.description: Sealing and shaping material for crude containers.

cards.name: Sand
cards.description: A basic filtration layer and packing material.

cards.name: River Stone
cards.description: Smooth stone for fire rings and support surfaces.

cards.name: Cattail Stalk
cards.description: Tough stalk for lashings and light weaving.

cards.name: Driftwood
cards.description: Weathered wood for frames and fuel.

cards.name: River Mussels
cards.description: Weak emergency shellfish. Safe only in small amounts and better cooked.

cards.name: Shore Grit
cards.description: Tiny bits of edible river margin forage. Barely worth eating.

cards.name: Unsafe Water
cards.description: Collected water. Unsafe until treated.

cards.name: Silt Clay
cards.description: Fine clay for potting and sealing.

cards.name: River Pebbles
cards.description: Loose stone fill and drainage material.

cards.name: Clay Lump
cards.description: Malleable clay for containers and sealing.

cards.name: Coarse Reed
cards.description: Strong woven material for water gear.

cards.name: Flat Stone
cards.description: A useful cooking or pounding surface.

cards.name: Stream Wood
cards.description: Water-sheened wood suitable for frames and traps.

cards.name: River Quartz
cards.description: High-value stone for better tools and fire work.

cards.name: Contaminated Current
cards.description: Waterborne illness risk. Unsafe water worsens without treatment.

cards.name: Flash Flood
cards.description: Rapid water surge. -1 Morale and a card loss risk.

meadow.name: Meadow
meadow.identity: Fibers, weak forage, feathers, and open-ground work
meadow.opportunity: Snare use, forage kit use, wraps, and smoke tool use
meadow.danger: Bad plant identification, exposure, and stings

cards.name: Grasses
cards.description: Abundant weaving and cordage material.

cards.name: Fibers
cards.description: Loose plant fibers for binding and wraps.

cards.name: Wild Onion
cards.description: Weak emergency forage. Safer than most but still inefficient.

cards.name: Berries
cards.description: Weak emergency forage. Risky if overused.

cards.name: Insects
cards.description: Emergency protein in a pinch.

cards.name: Herb Leaves
cards.description: Simple green material for basic medicine.

cards.name: Wax Pollen
cards.description: Soft material for waterproofing and craft glue.

cards.name: Feathers
cards.description: Light insulation and fletching material.

cards.name: Dry Stem
cards.description: Light fuel and basic frame material.

cards.name: Snare Cord
cards.description: Strong enough for trap work and lashing.

cards.name: Forage Herbs
cards.description: A better medicine ingredient from the meadow.

cards.name: Wraps
cards.description: Cloth-like binding material for care and insulation.

cards.name: Smoke Fiber
cards.description: Burns well in a smoke tool or slow fire.

cards.name: Bowstring
cards.description: High-tension cord for a bow or stronger trap work.

cards.name: Bee Stings
cards.description: Pain and distraction. -1 Morale, -1 Warmth.

cards.name: Wrong Plant
cards.description: Bad identification hurts. -1 Morale, -2 Hunger. Forager can negate it.

highground.name: High Ground
highground.identity: Visibility, stone, wind exposure, and rescue signaling
highground.opportunity: Signal kit use, mirror use, and rescue progress

cards.name: Stone
cards.description: General-purpose rock for building and weight.

cards.name: Quartz
cards.description: Spark-friendly mineral from exposed ridges.

cards.name: Signal Stone
cards.description: Light-colored stone that stands out from afar.

cards.name: Sparse Wood
cards.description: Thin wood from the ridge line.

cards.name: Gravel
cards.description: Loose stone for fill and drainage.

cards.name: Ridge Fiber
cards.description: Tough fiber from wind-bent plants.

cards.name: Windbreak Scrub
cards.description: Low brush that blocks some wind.

cards.name: Lookout Slate
cards.description: Flat stone useful for markers and platforms.

cards.name: Chalk Mark
cards.description: Bright marking material for signals.

cards.name: Lichen Patch
cards.description: Weak emergency forage from exposed rock. Low-value and slow to gather.

cards.name: Stunted Berries
cards.description: Sparse ridge berries. Small food, small benefit.

cards.name: Climbing Stone
cards.description: Grippy stone for holds and tool work.

cards.name: Signal Bundle
cards.description: A visible bundle for signaling and markers.

cards.name: Anchor Rope
cards.description: Secure line for climbing and shelter tie-downs.

cards.name: Flat Shelf
cards.description: Natural platform for gear or lookout use.

cards.name: Beacon Stone
cards.description: High-visibility stone for rescue markers.

cards.name: Wind Exposure
cards.description: Cold wind cuts through you. -2 Warmth, -1 Morale.

cards.name: Rockslide
cards.description: Loose rock gives way. Discard a card and lose morale.
